name: obsidian-better-edit
description: A multi-feature editing toolbox for Obsidian

scripts.build: node scripts/build-styles.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node scripts/version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run check:release
scripts.e2e:run: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'D:\Projects\obsidian-better-edit'; node node_modules\@playwright\test\cli.js test -c tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts"
scripts.e2e:attach: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'D:\Projects\obsidian-better-edit'; node node_modules\@playwright\test\cli.js test -c tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts"
scripts.e2e:smoke: npm run build && npm run e2e:reset && npm run e2e:sync && npm run e2e:ensure && npm run e2e:run
scripts.e2e:smoke:fresh: npm run build && npm run e2e:reset && npm run e2e:sync && npm run e2e:launch && npm run e2e:run
scripts.e2e:smoke:direct: npm run build && npm run e2e:reset && npm run e2e:sync && npm run e2e:attach
